# Syed Ahmer Shah

> Full-stack web developer and software engineering student from Hyderabad, Pakistan. Builds modern web applications, scalable backend systems, and maintainable software with a focus on clean code, security, and long-term reliability.

- DOB: 29 October 2006
- Location: Hyderabad, Pakistan
- Tagline: "Designing order within the digital wilderness."
- Current focus: PHP/Laravel, MySQL, WordPress, MERN stack (expanding)
- Freelancing: WordPress, full-stack web development

## Core Tech Stack

PHP, Laravel, MySQL, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS,
WordPress, Git, Java, Firebase, Supabase, Vercel, SEO

## Education

- B.S. Software Engineering — HITMS (Nov 2024 – Dec 2028)
- ADSE — Aptech Pakistan (Aug 2025 – Sep 2028)

## Featured Project

- [Commerza](https://github.com/ahmershahdev/Commerza): Production-grade PHP + MySQL e-commerce platform with secure admin dashboard, cart, Stripe + COD checkout, CSRF, CAPTCHA, rate limiting, audit logs, and stock locking.
